title: Atomic Recursion Time Waste Proof Review
human_verdict: No public evidence or atomic units currently document specific infrastructure time waste on the portal or repo. Existing Chess Court candidate remains clean with zero badge, zero onchain, and zero authority claims. Prior Grok receipts and final court lock files were reported by Grok as not yet verifiable through raw paths. Atomic recursion proof cannot be verified as fact without per-unit logs, timestamps, and receipts. A zero-trust schema candidate can be designed to structure future claims without narrative overreach.
atomic_units: None PUBLIC: no action/system/time/event-marker/evidence/receipt-tag tuples exist on portal.html or in receipts/
Portal Active Courts and Constraints remain candidate-only and doctrine-compliant
evidence_required: Per-unit: action attempted + system/surface + time/event marker + evidence artifact + receipt status + claim tag
Committed receipt files for all referenced Grok counters, portal mutation, governance watch, and final court lock
Candidate schema file before any structured time-waste claims
canon_line: Chess Court is the board. Receipts are the moves. Pain is signal. Receipts are structure. Atomic units beat narrative fog. No piece moves without evidence. Propose pretty. Prove boring.
